name: Feature Request

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include API surface if relevant:

```typescript
// Example of how you'd like to use the feature
const result = await sdk.someNewMethod({...});
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they're less ideal.

## Additional Context

Any related issues, specs, or external references.
